Built on Tulsa Values

Oil Capital Deck Solutions isn't just building decks; we're building relationships across Tulsa. Founded over a decade ago by a team of experienced carpenters, we saw a need for reliable, high-quality deck construction that could withstand Oklahoma's demanding climate.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our deck contractor services.

How long does deck construction typically take?

The timeframe depends on the size and complexity of the project, but most decks can be completed within 2-4 weeks.

Do I need a permit to build a deck in Tulsa?

Yes, a building permit is required for most deck construction projects in Tulsa. We handle the permitting process for our clients.

What type of decking material is best for Tulsa's climate?

Composite decking is a popular choice for Tulsa due to its resistance to moisture, fading, and insect damage. Pressure-treated wood is also a durable and cost-effective option.

Reviews From Our Deck Contractor Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Oil Capital Deck Solutions built us a beautiful new deck off our kitchen. The design process was collaborative, and the crew was professional and efficient. The finished product is exactly what we wanted, and we've already enjoyed many evenings out there. Highly recommend!"

Sarah M. Deck Construction

"Our deck had some serious rot after the winter, especially around the support posts. Oil Capital Deck Solutions came out and replaced the damaged sections quickly and at a fair price. They also gave us some great tips on how to maintain the deck and prevent future problems."

David K. Deck Repair

"We hired Oil Capital Deck Solutions to stain and seal our deck, and we couldn't be happier with the results. The deck looks brand new, and the stain color is perfect. The crew was meticulous and paid attention to every detail. They even cleaned up thoroughly afterward. A+ service!"

Emily L. Deck Staining & Sealing
